note: Sprint 5.40 Trinity Sprint Release Runner v0.1: local preflight verifier that inspects repo state, runs tests, walks an optional demo dir for Trinity artifacts identified by schema content (NOT filename), and emits a single JSON + Markdown release-readiness report. The runner is a READ-ONLY observer with seven const-true safety flags: no_git_push, no_git_merge, no_git_tag, no_wallet_access, no_signing, no_broadcast, no_network_required. CLI: 'python3 scripts/trinity/sprint_release_runner.py verify --repo-root --sprint-id --branch --base-ref --out-json --out-md --pinned-time [--pytest-target] [--demo-root] [--require-clean-tracked-tree] [--allow-untracked]'. Exit codes: 0 = ready_to_release true, 1 = ready_to_release false (warnings recorded), 2 = setup error (bad repo-root, etc.). Uses subprocess ONLY with argv lists and ONLY for an explicit allow-list of read-only git verbs (rev-parse, status, diff, log, branch, ls-files, rev-list) plus the pytest invocation; shell=True forbidden statically. Destructive git argv literals 'push', 'merge', 'tag', 'reset', 'checkout', 'rm', 'clean', 'commit', 'add', 'stash' are forbidden by static lint — the runner CANNOT mutate git state by design. Artifact discovery walks --demo-root recursively for *.json and identifies each file by its 'schema' field against a 4-entry registry: trinity-task-queue-autopilot-report/v0.1 -> autopilot_report, trinity-task-queue-dashboard/v0.1 -> dashboard, trinity-daily-report/v0.1 -> daily_report, trinity-worker-trial-pack-manifest/v0.1 -> trial_pack_manifest. Filename can be anything (demo-report.json, weird-name.json, …). Per-artifact summary extracted: autopilot batches/completed/failed/safety_status, dashboard counts/safety_status, daily report top_materials/cache_hits_total/workers_seen_total, trial_pack pack_id/worker_id/expected_compute_output_sha256/repo_commit_short. Symlink-safe (only files whose resolved path stays inside --demo-root are considered), capped at 100 entries. Output is trinity-sprint-release-report/v0.1 JSON + Markdown report with 8 sections (Branch, Commits, Tree status, Changed files, Tests, Demo artifacts, Warnings, Safety flags); no absolute /tmp/ leak, no <script>, no inline CSS. Hard gates that flip ready_to_release to false: branch mismatch, dirty tracked tree with --require-clean-tracked-tree, untracked files present without --allow-untracked, pytest returncode != 0 / any failure / any error. New schema schemas/trinity/sprint_release_report.schema.json with $id=trinity-sprint-release-report/v0.1, additionalProperties=false at every level, 7 const-locked safety flags, head_commit pattern ^[0-9a-f]{40}$, report_id pattern ^tsr-[0-9a-f]{16}$, sprint_id pattern ^sprint-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+$, artifact_type enum locked to the 4 known types, demo_artifacts maxItems 100, changed_files maxItems 200, commits_ahead maxItems 50. Tests: 1518 passed + 38 skipped on the deployment host (1474 prior + 44 new = 14 functional + 19 schema + 11 safety). Tests include: clean report schema-validates over a tiny git repo built in tmp_path; wrong branch warns + sets ready_to_release false; dirty tracked tree blocks with --require-clean-tracked-tree; untracked files block unless --allow-untracked; artifact discovery by schema content (NOT filename) finds 4 fixtures dropped under arbitrary names + ignores non-Trinity JSON; pytest failure marks not ready; pytest pass keeps ready; disallowed git verbs (push/merge/tag/reset/checkout) rejected at call time with ReleaseRunnerError; markdown has all 8 sections + no /tmp leak; CLI returns 0/1/2 per the documented gate contract. Static safety tests assert: no shell=True, no os.system/os.popen, no eval/exec, no network primitive (requests/urllib/httpx/aiohttp/socket/http.client), no GitHub API surface (api.github.com / GITHUB_TOKEN / X-GitHub- / PyGithub / import github), no wallet/sign/broadcast tokens (ecdsa/secp256k1/sign_tx/sendrawtransaction/sost-cli/privkey/private_key_hex), no LLM client imports (anthropic/openai/langchain/transformers/llama_cpp), no string-form subprocess.run('...') (argv lists only), no destructive git argv literals, ALLOWED_GIT_VERBS constant present with all 7 verbs, KNOWN_ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS constant present with all 4 schemas, sibling-import lint passes (release runner imports NO other Trinity module). Manual demo over /tmp/trinity-5-37-39-final-v3 (the prior sprint's post-tag demo dir): report_id=tsr-3c42d3b1b3e755ff, branch_match=true, head_commit=1ee65424dfa93a92ff38cbd2bdc254c1aa4408fe, base_commit=1ee65424dfa93a92ff38cbd2bdc254c1aa4408fe, pytest 1518 passed/0 failed/38 skipped, demo_artifacts_count=4 (daily-report.json -> daily_report, TRINITY_TASK_QUEUE_DASHBOARD_dsh-efade89432db8d22.json -> dashboard, TRINITY_TASK_QUEUE_AUTOPILOT_REPORT_tap-c1f2eb76972a873b.json -> autopilot_report, PACK_MANIFEST.json -> trial_pack_manifest), safety_status=ok, warnings=0, ready_to_release=true, all 7 safety_flags const-true, MD has no /tmp leak no <script>. Block path also verified: --branch trinity/WRONG-BRANCH-NAME yields branch_match=false, ready_to_release=false, safety_status=warning, runner_rc=1. Pure scripts+schemas+docs+tests merge: zero src/, zero consensus, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes. Non-goals (documented): NOT a release tool (does not push/merge/tag), NOT a CI surrogate, NOT a daemon, NOT GitHub-aware (no API surface), NOT a wallet/signer/broadcaster.
